## What & why

Briefly: what does this change, and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`./tests/run-tests.ps1`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (no `yt-cookies.txt`, tokens, or `yt-dlp.exe`)
- [ ] Keeps the core working with **no required API keys / paid accounts**
- [ ] Follows "verify before claiming success" where it reports playback
- [ ] Added/updated tests where practical

Thanks for contributing! 🎧
